title: Ancient Debris From Brute
description: Easier way of getting Ancient Debris instead of strip mining for 5 hours!
body: Every feel mining for Ancient Debris took so long? This datapacks made Piglin Brute drop Ancient Debris with a low chance of 15% , the chance can be increased by 5% per looting levels. You can change this by edit the loot table inside the datapacks if you wish to.
